---
title: "EDA"
author: "Ike Charistan D"
format: html
---

## Load the library and the datasets
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
library(webshot2)
library(dplyr)
library(janitor)
setwd("~/Desktop/Data 110")
grants <- read.csv("State_of_Maryland_Grant_and_Loan_Data__FY2009_to_FY2024.csv")
setwd("~/Desktop/Data 205")
wages <-read.csv("Maryland_Average_Wage_Per_Job_(Current_Dollars)__2014-2024_20260414.csv") 
head(wages)
head(grants)
```
## EDA (Cleanning the primary datasets)

```{r}
grants <- grants %>% clean_names()
zip_lookup <- zip_lookup %>% clean_names()
wages_long <- wages_long %>% clean_names()
```

```{r}
zip_lookup <- zip_lookup %>%
  mutate(zip_code = as.character(zip_code))
```

```{r}
#names(zip_lookup)
#names(grants)
#names(wages_long)
#names(grants_filtered)
```

```{r}
grants_clean <- grants %>%
  mutate(
    zip_code = as.character(zip_code),
    fiscal_year = as.numeric(fiscal_year)
  ) %>%
  left_join(zip_lookup, by = "zip_code") %>%
  
  # Keep only relevant counties EARLY
  filter(county %in% c("Montgomery County", "Prince George's County")) %>%
  
  # Aggregate properly
  group_by(fiscal_year, county) %>%
  summarize(
    total_grant_amount = sum(amount, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
head(grants_clean)
```

## Join Datasets

```{r}
df <- grants_clean %>%
  inner_join(wages_long, by = c("fiscal_year" = "year", "county" = "county"))
head(df)
```
```{r}
str(df)
library(readr)

df <- df %>%
  mutate(avg_wage = parse_number(avg_wage))
```
## 1st Visualisation

```{r}
library(scales)

ggplot(df, aes(x = factor(fiscal_year),
               y = total_grant_amount,
               fill = county)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Montgomery County" = "#003366",
    "Prince George's County" = "#C8102E"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +  # <-- this fixes it
  labs(
    title = "Annual State Grant Totals: Montgomery vs. Prince George's County",
    x = "Fiscal Year",
    y = "Total Funding ($)",
    fill = "County"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
## 2nd Visualisation

```{r}
ggplot(df, aes(x = total_grant_amount, 
               y = avg_wage, 
               color = county)) +
  geom_point(size = 3, alpha = 0.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = FALSE, linewidth = 1) +
  labs(
    title = "Grant Funding vs. Average Wage",
    x = "Total Grant Amount",
    y = "Average Wage Per Job",
    color = "County"
  ) +
  theme_light()

```
## 3rd Visualisation

```{r}
library(scales)
df_2023 <- df %>%
  filter(fiscal_year == 2023)

ggplot(df_2023, aes(x = reorder(county, total_grant_amount), 
                   y = total_grant_amount, 
                   fill = county)) +
  
  geom_col(show.legend = FALSE, color = "black", linewidth = 0.3) +
  
  geom_text(aes(label = dollar(total_grant_amount, scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M")),
            hjust = -0.2, size = 5, fontface = "bold") +
  
  scale_fill_manual(values = c(
    "Montgomery County" = "#005A9C",
    "Prince George's County" = "#E21833"
  )) +
  
  coord_flip() +
  
  scale_y_continuous(
    labels = label_dollar(scale = 1e-6, suffix = "M"),
    expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))
  ) +
  
  labs(
    title = "Total State Grant Funding by County",
    subtitle = "Fiscal Year 2023 Comparison",
    x = "County Name", 
    y = "Total Funding (Millions USD)"
  ) +
  
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", color = "black"),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 20, face = "bold", color = "#333333"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank()
  )
```
